name: CheckSmart
description_short: Garfield Heights, OH CheckSmart at 5062 Turney Rd offers check cashing and payday loans to the local community.
description_long:
CheckSmart at 5062 Turney Rd in Garfield Heights, OH is a standalone check-cashing location serving residents who need quick access to financial services. The store is open Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 7PM, Friday 8AM to 8PM, and Saturday 9AM to 4PM, with Sunday closures.

At this Garfield Heights location, CheckSmart provides check cashing, payday loans, and other financial solutions designed for residents who need fast access to cash. Contact the store at +1 216-587-5631 to ask about current services, fees, or eligibility requirements for borrowing.

If you're a Garfield Heights resident needing to cash a check quickly, bring a valid ID and your check during business hours. CheckSmart serves the local community with accessible financial services when you need them most.
pros: Extended operating hours including evenings until 8 PM and Sunday availability accommodates working customers
Online appointment scheduling available to reduce in-store wait times
Multiple financial services available at single location: check cashing, wire transfers, bill pay, and loan access
Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance available in-store for unbanked customers
Gift card cash exchange service provides additional liquidity options
Multiple Columbus-area locations (5 within city) plus statewide network reduces travel burden
Clear pre-visit preparation guidance and required documents list provided on website
cons: Operates as loan facilitator with third-party lenders, creating lack of direct accountability for terms and conditions
Website contains no transparent disclosure of APR, fees, loan terms, or repayment schedules
Business model centered on check-cashing and transaction services suggests targeting financially vulnerable customers
Limited information available about actual lending products, rates, or approval criteria
No mention of alternative products or debt management education despite serving high-need consumer base
best_for: Customers needing immediate check cashing or wire transfer services
Unbanked individuals requiring debit card access and basic transaction services
Customers in financial emergency seeking same-day cash with flexible evening/weekend hours
Consumers with limited credit history unable to access traditional banking services
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for customers needing immediate cash access through check cashing, wire transfers, or debit card services, particularly those with limited banking options who work during traditional bank hours. The critical caveat is that actual lending terms, APR, and fees are not disclosed on the website, requiring in-store consultation; borrowers should carefully evaluate all loan terms before accepting any third-party lending product and consider whether immediate cash justifies the likely cost.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance
In-store loan application and approval process
meta_description: CheckSmart at 5062 Turney Rd, Garfield Heights, OH. Fast check cashing and payday loans.
